concerns.text: FR-001 states the system must support analysis of '≥ 80 subjects', while User Story 1 Acceptance Scenario 1 requires output for '≥ 80% of the original subjects'. These are not equivalent constraints. If the dataset contains 100 subjects, both align, but if it contains 50 subjects (as suggested in Assumptions), FR-001 becomes impossible to satisfy while US-1 remains valid. The requirement should align with the dataset-dependent percentage or a fixed minimum consistent with the '≥ 50' assumption.

The Assumptions section states the dataset contains 'a sufficient number of subjects (≥ 50)', yet FR-001 mandates support for '≥ 80 subjects'. This creates a potential contradiction where the system requirement exceeds the assumed data availability, risking a failure to meet FR-001 if the dataset only has 50-79 subjects.
